LanguageData.BEWH.Abhuman.Contract.Title: Kin Contracts
LanguageData.BEWH.Abhuman.Contract.GoodwillTooltip: Goodwill is the general show of much the kin like and affects other aspects. It goes from 0-100 with -100 being reserved for hostility.
LanguageData.BEWH.Abhuman.Contract.PriceMultTooltip: This is the price multipler on the things they'll trade you. over 1 being in your favor and below being in theirs. Scales of goodwill
LanguageData.BEWH.Abhuman.Contract.MaximumContractsTo: Maximum amount of offered contracts. Scales of goodwill
LanguageData.BEWH.Abhuman.Contract.ItemNotReceived: You didn't send the requested item in time and have angered the Kin, they will soon send a "reclaiming" party to get what is theirs and settle their grudge.
LanguageData.BEWH.Abhuman.Beastman.HerdstoneInUse: {0} is currently conducting a ritual here.
LanguageData.BEWH.Abhuman.Beastman.HerdstoneNoAffinit: Does not have the Herdstone Affinity gene.
LanguageData.BEWH.Abhuman.Beastman.HerdstoneCooldown: Time until ritual can be performed
LanguageData.BEWH.Abhuman.Beastman.SpawnedMinotaurMes: Through lengthy occult practice {0} has emerge from beyond the veil.
LanguageData.BEWH.Abhuman.Navigator.WarpTravelMessage: After spending {1} travelling in the warp, navigator {0} has succesfully teleported {2} to their desired location.
LanguageData.BEWH.Abhuman.Kin.CrucibleGrowDesc: Start the process to grow a new Kin
LanguageData.BEWH.Abhuman.Felinid.Nuzzled: Cutie {0} nuzzled me, so soft! UwU
LanguageData.BEWH.Abhuman.PlacementLimit.RequiresKin: Requires a colonist with the 'Cloneskein' gene on the map to place.
LanguageData.BEWH.Abhuman.PlacementLimit.RequiresBeas: Requires a colonist with the 'Herdstone Affinity' gene on the map to place.
LanguageData.BEWH.Abhuman.PlacementLimit.RequiresHerd: Requires a player built herdstone on the map.
LanguageData.BEWH.Abhuman.PlacementLimit.HerdstoneCon: Can only place {0} conduits on map, currently {1} exists.
